sections.paragraph:
-(I) i.q. נֹוצָא (part. Niph. from יָצָא) something cast out, excrement in the crop of a bird, Lev 1:16. Compare צֵאָה and צֹואָה.

(II) i.q. נֹוצָה (which see) a feather, pinion, from נָצָה No. I, 1.

[נְצוּרָה f. guard, watch, Isa 1:8. Root נָצַר I. עִיר נְצוּרָה watch-tower. See Thes. p. 908].

I.
